sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n470" key="a)gersiku/bhlis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγερ-σῐκύβηλις</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n470.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mendicant priest</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:62" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">62</biblScope></bibl>. (From <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κύβηλις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl></cit>, not <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Κυβέλη</foreign>.)</sense> </entryFree>
